title: Configuration dialog missing in 1.77.2
author: GeriZ
body_snippet:
## Expected Behavior
I would expect the configuration dialog under "View"

## Current Behavior
The configuration dialog under "View" is missing

## Workaround
"Reset layout" opens the configuration dialog

## Context
I cannot edit my existing and new server connections

## Your Environment
Windows 10 Pro 21H2 19044.1645 x64

iterations.description: The core application configuration dialog is reported as missing in version 1.77.2, indicating a critical functionality bug affecting user interaction.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

notes:
AI triage (gemini): The core application configuration dialog is reported as missing in version 1.77.2, indicating a critical functionality bug affecting user interaction.
Approach: Investigate the instantiation and display logic within `OptionsWindow.cs` and `frmOptions.cs` to identify why the configuration dialog is not appearing. This may involve examining its lifecycle, visibility settings, and any recent code changes that could have introduced a regression.
